placements.overview: Amrita School of Ayurveda, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Amritapuri Campus is a distinguished institution located in the state of Amritapuri. The institute offers a range of Certificate and Degree courses, which include PG and UG. These courses are approved by the CCIM and are designed to be delivered in full-time mode. The institute offers various courses such as B.A.M.S., Certificate, MD, MS covering major streams such as Medicine and Health Sciences. Courses are taught by experienced faculty members who are experts in Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved, Ayurved and various other fields. The institute have 98 seats and it provides quality education at an affordable fee; ranging between INR 15,000-1,767,825, making these courses accessible to all, and allowing students to acquire knowledge and expertise in their chosen fields. Moreover, the institute provides excellent infrastructure facilities to support students' learning experiences.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurveda Medicine and Surgery (B.A.M.S.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Academically excellent campus. Also satisfied about the Events.

review_content.Placements: First of all, this course is a medical course, so it doesn't require placement, or the placements are very few in medical colleges. Most of the students, after completing this course, opt for higher studies like specializations or try to get into a government medical job. So placements are less in this sense, but still, the faculty members here will mentor you the right way.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, this college has a well-developed library, including some ancient manuscripts which can be used for references. Sports and games are developing, and they have a huge ground as the Campus Sports Complex. Wi-Fi, labs, and hostels are good. Wi-Fi routers are provided in each room in the Men's Hostel and on each floor in the Ladies' Hostel. The quality of food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurveda Medicine and Surgery (B.A.M.S.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good academics with strict management rules.

review_content.Placements: Ayurveda doesn't offer placements. So the college doesn't have placements. The average salary package of freshers in the hospital is RMO Rs 15,000 - Rs 20,000 per month. Its based upon the skills and experience not upon the marks and grades. After graduation, you can join as RMO in the clinical side, as in non-clinical side quality assistant, insurance medical officer, content creator, and writer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-built and has a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi can only access non-social media things during work time, strictly for academic purposes only all other services are blocked. Well-built classrooms and all the labs are well-equipped with good quality things. A tiny ground is there, and a small badminton court too.

faqs.question: Is Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center a good college?
faqs.answer: SSIMSRC is a college which is slowly growing popularity among the students. There are popular programmes available in the college that are MBBS, MD/MS, etc. The college has an attached hospital where students get training with ease. The college was also ranked 54 by India Today for Medicine & Health Sciences Ranking 2024.

faqs.question: Is MSc Nursing a good career?
faqs.answer:
Yes because with MSc Nursing nurses get to work in mnay sectors like multispeciality hospitals, private or government healthcare units, academic or research institutes, nursing homes, old age homes and also armed services.
There are many job options like nursing educator, staff nurse, nurse assistant or even nursing supervisor.

faqs.question: Which courses does Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center offer?
faqs.answer: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center provides programmes including M.Sc, MD, B.Sc, MBBS in streams such as Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Medical Surgical Nursing, Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing, Psychiatric Nursing, Paediatric Nursing, Pathology, Physiology, Anatomy.

faqs.question: Is Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center ranked?
faqs.answer: Sri Siddhartha Institute of Medical Science and Research Center is ranked 54th by India Today 2024 for Medicine & Health Sciences. Right now there is no ranking granted to the college but the college hopes to rank in the coming days.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, there's no concept of placements since most students are for NEET PG exam preparation. There are good lecture halls with air conditioning, well-equipped labs for practical, and a good clinical setup to practice. The hostel facilities are available with mess.

reviews_list.review_title: I have a good experience, so students can join it.

review_content.Placements: As of now, I cannot talk about placements as the senior-most batch is in the 3rd year of MBBS, although they have many clinical postings. They're even posted to CHC Kheri Kalan and all in nearby villages like Badshahpur, and OPDs are not crowded as of now.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a very nice and well-maintained infrastructure. Hostels have attached washrooms, and 2 students stay in a room. 1st year students' hostels are different from seniors'. The mess food is pathetic, bad, and overpriced. They even wrap up the food before the time. All facilities are good. Labs are well-equipped.

individual_reviews.title: I have a good experience, so students can join it.

content.Placements: As of now, I cannot talk about placements as the senior-most batch is in the 3rd year of MBBS, although they have many clinical postings. They're even posted to CHC Kheri Kalan and all in nearby villages like Badshahpur, and OPDs are not crowded as of now.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very nice and well-maintained infrastructure. Hostels have attached washrooms, and 2 students stay in a room. 1st year students' hostels are different from seniors'. The mess food is pathetic, bad, and overpriced. They even wrap up the food before the time. All facilities are good. Labs are well-equipped.

paragraphs: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad admissionprocess involves online registration, form filling, entrance test, release of merit list, and seat allotment. Admission to some of the courses is entrance-based while for others, merit in the last qualifying exam is taken into consideration. Candidates who meet the respective course-specific eligibility criteria can fill out the online application form. Details regarding each stage of the admission procedure are explained in the following sections.
1: Application Process

Candidates interested in getting admission into Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad must complete the online application process for the desired course. Eligible students can apply by visiting its official website (amrita.edu). The application procedure involves online registration, form filling, document upload, and application fee payment.
2: Selection Criteria

After the application process, candidates have to go through the course-specific entrance exam followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, course-wise selection lists can be released by the institute on its official website (with the names of the shortlisted students).
3: Admission Confirmation

Candidates who make it to the selection list can report to the institute to confirm their seat. Some amount of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad fee may have to be paid for admission confirmation.

college_info.college_name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad under Amrita University offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The eligible students are awarded Amrita Chancellor’s Scholarships which are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The below-mentioned is the criterion for Amrita scholarships:
Note: The above-mentioned scholarships are applicable for UG, PG, PhD programmes. These scholarships are not applicable to programmes in the fields of Pharmacy, Nursing, and Allied Health Sciences.
The following clauses are communicated to students during the scholarship admission:

Amrita scholarships are awarded on a one-time renewable basis, for any single programme in an academic year. The scholarship is valid for a period of one year and is renewable each and every year based on the student’s academic performance and also conduct

Scholarships commonly are tuition fee waivers only, and the amount of this waiver is based on the type of scholarship that is awarded to students. This is strictly non-negotiable and cannot be extended to any other fees categories or substituted in cash
No student is eligible to have more than one scholarship at a time, irrespective of the amount or type of scholarship and/or study support donations

The Scholarship Committee must set the evaluation criterion for cessation or renewal of the scholarship with applicable renewal conditions. The validity of the scholarship duration is based on the students' satisfactory academic performance in each and every semester / trimester, regular class attendance as well as good standards of behavior throughout the duration of programme

The scholarships are awarded with the support of the academic transcripts that have been submitted by various students as part of the eligibility fulfillment. Discrepancy in any of the supporting or submitted documents will result in immediate withdrawal of the scholarship and/or the admission

The students must submit the AIU (Association of Indian Universities) equivalence certificate for the last foreign academic qualification and/or various academic transcripts to complete the eligibility criterion. Non-compliance in the submission of the AIU certificate can also lead to withdrawal of the scholarship
Download the Amrita Scholarships Brochure

There are various other Student Financial Aid and Scholarships awarded to students. These scholarships are based on merit, economic need, equal opportunity, and also affirmative actions for socially backward groups. The scholarship policy does not discriminate against students or even scholars based on gender preference, gender, caste, age, faith, or even disability. Below is the summary of the criteria that play a crucial role in making the scholarship decisions:

Top students in any of the schools are eligible for this scholarship consideration. To avail of and become eligible for the merit scholarship benefit, students must provide proof of academic and scholarly accomplishments.  The percentile of students receiving this scholarship depends upon the school and area of specialisation.

The university is greatly committed to affirmative actions for such backward groups such as SC/ST, OBC, and other such groups that are approved by the Government of India. A certain percentage of such groups will always be receiving the scholarships each year.
The Special Disadvantaged groups include women, those with disabilities, and others. These groups are not treated with any discrimination and are afforded an equal opportunity for scholarship.
Scholarship Application Process

The students must contact the departmental office and submit the complete application form. The department will provide various students with a list of several scholarship schemes available for them. The students are responsible for submitting all the necessary documentation based on these schemes. Such documentation includes proof of merit, government-approved proofs for members of Backward communities, recommendation letters for merit scholarships, and any other necessary documentation for special disadvantaged groups.
Download the Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Scholarships Brochure

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's an average college to study in.

content.Placements: This course is new in our college so I think it takes time to show companies to placed students from this college. I don't know about the average package of the students in this course and I am sure there are no internships in this college; you have to complete your internship on your own.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good because of the land overview. The vast area is empty space and filled with plants and flowers so I think the college is good at infrastructure and there is ground to play sports. And there is a badminton court also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions one of the best and top recommended college. Students.

content.Placements: There were a total of 45 students in my batch. From which 35 got their placement. The highest package offered in our course was 1 Lacs P. A. and the average was 19000 per month before training. The top recruiting companies for our course were mostly IT sector based companies.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was very good with providing facilities like gym, hostel, mess, a cafeteria, High teach computer labs, seminar halls, auditorium and much more. It provides many seminars by experts in their field so that students can learn from their experience and to get the proper roadmap to reach their goal.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023

In my opinion, the highest package of the college is 23 lakh, and the lowest is 4 lakh, and the companies visiting are not so good.
content.Infrastructure: This college is good for facilitating but not too good, so you will be in this college, and sports are also good. The hostel has 2 types of facilities, like AC rooms and normal rooms with different packages, so you can take according to your comfort.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied by the infrastructure and the faculty.

content.Placements: To get a placement, you have to maintain your attendance at least 75%. On average, 35-40% of students get their placement, while others go for their medical shop, and some go for higher studies like B.Pharm to gain knowledge about business and marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. I like the hostel they are providing, but I think they are overpriced. Some rooms have no tiles and are average. The 3-seater A/C room is overpriced. Instead of A/C, they have only installed a cooler, which we have to share with roommates.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is fairly good, and you can consider applying here. Placement opportunities are decent.

content.Placements: 20% of students were placed in Computer Science Engineering. The average package offered in our course ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. Companies like Infosys and Wipro participate in placements. However, only 5 to 6% of students secured internships. Placement opportunities are fairly good; some students receive packages, but many do not.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are good. The library provides a conducive atmosphere for studying. All facilities are provided to every student at our college. It has a positive environment for studying overall, with a quiet lab atmosphere.

admission_process.title: Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutionsadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers UG and PG level courses such as BTech, BBA, MCA, MBA, etc. To get admitted to SRGI, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The institute also offers doctorate and diploma courses besides the UG and PG courses. The selection criteria for all the courses is based on merit or entrance exam as per respective courses. The application process atSanjay Rungta Group of Institutionsis conducted both online. Read the article to know more aboutSanjay Rungta Group of Institutionscourse admission2025.

Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions admission 2025is a mix of merit and entrance-based as per respective courses. The institute offers more than 10 courses (including specialisation) in various streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Application, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutSanjay Rungta Group of Institutions course admissions2025:
Particulars
Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

In order to get admission at SRGI, the candidate should pass Class 12 for all UG courses. For PG courses, students must pass graduate. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSanjay Rungta Group of Institutions courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Class 12 with a 55% aggregate with PCB
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Graduation with a 55% aggregate
Graduation in any stream

Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions admissionsis a mix of entrance and merit-based as per respective courses. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://www.rungtacolleges.com/applynow/) online course application.
STEP 2: Selection

The college considers entrance exam scores, i.e., CAT/CMAT/ATMA/XAT for the MBA courses. For the UG courses like BDS and BTech, students are selected based on NEET and JEE Main scores. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSanjay Rungta Group of Institutions feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

reviews.review_heading: It's an average college to study in.
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is good because of the land overview. The vast area is empty space and filled with plants and flowers so I think the college is good at infrastructure and there is ground to play sports. 
And there is a badminton court also.

reviews.review_heading: Sanjay Rungta Group of Institutions one of the best and top recommended college. Students.
reviews.review_text: The campus was very good with providing facilities like gym, hostel, mess, a cafeteria, High teach computer labs, seminar halls, auditorium and much more. It provides many seminars by experts in their field so that students can learn from their experience and to get the proper roadmap to reach their goal.

reviews.review_heading: Average college for students.
reviews.review_text: This college is good for facilitating but not too good, so you will be in this college, and sports are also good. The hostel has 2 types of facilities, like AC rooms and normal rooms with different packages, so you can take according to your comfort.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied by the infrastructure and the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. I like the hostel they are providing, but I think they are overpriced. Some rooms have no tiles and are average. The 3-seater A/C room is overpriced. Instead of A/C, they have only installed a cooler, which we have to share with roommates.

reviews.review_heading: My college is fairly good, and you can consider applying here. Placement opportunities are decent.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are good. The library provides a conducive atmosphere for studying. All facilities are provided to every student at our college. It has a positive environment for studying overall, with a quiet lab atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure now is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and infrastructure is available for our course in biotechnology, but there are some small labs and there are fewer books in the library. Facilities for hostels are good for students who are far away from their homes, and the food quality is good. The mess food is fresh.

highlights.summary: TNOU online admission 2025 is open. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

college_info.intro:
Tamil Nadu Open University, Chennai, offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses across various streams such as Humanities and Social Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, and so on. TNOU is popularly known for its MBA programme and followed by BA programmes.
The university offers a two-year MBA programme. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Business Analysts, Compliance Analysts, Investment Bankers, Market Research Analysts, and others. The Tamil Nadu Open University offers BA specialisation in various fields such as English, Political Studies, History, Sociology, Economics, Human Rights, and others. After BA students opt for higher studies or work in various fields as per their specialisations. Below are some of the programmes offered by Tamil Nadu Open University courses fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Tamil Nadu Open University offers both B.Ed and B.Ed Spl.Ed. for two-year each. Below is the minimum academic qualification required to apply for any of the programmes:Aspirants must pass bachelor's or master's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate to apply for TNOU B.Ed and B.Ed Spl.Ed. programme.Candidates with bachelor's in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science and Mathematics with a minimum of 55% aggregate can also apply.There is relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates. Aspirants belonging to BC/ BCM need 45% aggregate, 43% for MBC/ DNC and 40% for SC/ SCA/ ST in graduation.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for B.Ed in Tamil Nadu Open University?

faqs.answer: A:    TNOU does not refunds programme fee once paid by the candidates. However, if on scrutiny, the applicant is found ineligible for admission to his or her programme of choice, an amount of INR 500 is with held by the university as processing fee. The balance amount of the fee already paid to the university is refunded to the applicant in such case.

faqs.answer: Tamil Nadu Open University offers two-year B.Ed Special Education in distance education mode through the Department of Special Education. Besides, the university also offers two-year B.Ed programme. However, the student-teacher ispermitted to complete within a maximum period of 5 years, after the enrolment.The duration for B.Ed Spl.Ed is two-years for candidates with RCI recognised D.Ed Specialisation Education, Candidates can complete the programme within a maximum period of four years, after enrolment. Candidates must follow the Tamil Nadu Open University BSc application process:Step 1: Visit the official website of Tamil Nadu Open University.Step 2: The home page will appear where candidates must click on the ‘ONLINE ADMISSION’ tab.Step 3: On clicking the admission tab, a web page screen will appear for making entries of new registration of students for entering their application details.The University also keeps a brief window for offline admissions for certain candidates as they may not access the online application process. If necessary, the personnel at all of the university regional centers and learner support centers facilitate and help students submit online applications.

course_faqs.question: Is MBA available at TNOU?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Tamil Nadu Open University offers MBA programme for two-years at the PG level. The course is offered in semester pattern with curriculum divided into four semesters. Aspirants need to pass graduation to apply for MBA course. The selection for MBA is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

course_faqs.question: Are there any scholarships or grants for MBA students at Tamil Nadu Open University?
course_faqs.answer: TNOU has established the Alumni Association whose objective is to create and establish Alumni endowments for granting scholarships, prizes, and medals to learners showing high proficiency in studies and honoring graduated learners. The association renders financial aid to academically deserving and economically/ socially underprivileged learners.

admission_overview.college_name: TNOU Admission 2025: Courses, Dates, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: TNOU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TNOU admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts entrance exam for some of the courses.Tamil Nadu Open University (TNOU)offers a plethora of UG, PG, Doctoral, Diploma, Vocational Diploma, and Certificate courses. The university also offers courses that can be pursued after Class 10. Some of the popular courses offered by TNOU are BCA, BA, BBA, BCom, MA, MSc, MBA, etc. Candidates can apply online forTNOU admission. In addition, the university has set up 12 regional centres throughout Tamil Nadu to assist students in the application process.

Tamil Nadu Open University offers courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma levels. The university offers courses in full-time distance education mode. Candidates are required to apply online for their preferred course. Below areTamil Nadu Open University admissionhighlights:
Particulars
TNOU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 3,000 - INR 28,100
PG courses:INR 3,400 - INR 1 lakh
How to apply?
https://tnou.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Tamil Nadu Open University admissionsare mostly based on merit. Candidates need to complete Class 12 for UG courses whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university conducts an entrance test for admission to B.Ed (Spl.Edu.), MPhil and PhD courses. For all other courses, selection is merit-based. Find below the topTNOU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor's or master's degree in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate
Bachelor's in Engineering or Technology with specialisation in Science and Mathematics with a minimum of 55% aggregate

Tamil Nadu Open University fees include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Caution fee is one-time payable at the time of admission. Furthermore, a 100% fee concession is given to jail inmates, transgenders, and destitute windows students. But the convocation fee has to be paid. Additionally, the students joining any course in Tamil medium are eligible for a 10% concession on tuition fees. Find belowTNOU feefor popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

TNOU seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in their preferred course based on their merit. The university also provides reservations in seats for certain categories. Below is the seat intake for TNOU courses:
Tamil Nadu Open University reserves some percentage of seats for reserved category candidates. Below is the reservation policy followed at TNOU:

Tamil Nadu Open University admissioncycle begins inJanuary. Candidates are required to first fill out the application form for the preferred course. The selection to most of the courses is merit-based. Below is the step-wiseTNOU admissionprocess:
STEP 1: TNOU Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to fill out the application form online for most of the courses. For B.Ed, aspirants can download the form and submit it along with a DD. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 500 for B.Ed.
STEP 2: Selection

Tamil Nadu Open University selects candidates for most of the course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. For B.Ed Spl.Ed., MPhil and PhD courses, candidates have to appear for an entrance exam conducted by the university. TNOU releases a rank list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates.
STEP 3: Admission Counselling

Selected candidates need to participate in the admission counselling. During the counselling, candidates are allotted learner support centres. While coming for admission counselling, aspirants are required to bring admission fee in the form of DD. Candidates also need to bring their documents for verification.
For more details about admission process ofTamil Nadu Open University check out below videos:

Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 10 to apply for diploma courses. The university selects candidates for diploma courses based on their merit.

faqs.question: How do I take admission in Diploma at TNOU?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in any of the Diploma programmes offered at TNOU must pass a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent. The university shortlists candidates for Diploma based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Selected candidates have to pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for Diploma at TNOU?
faqs.answer: TNOU Diploma total tuition fee ranges betweenINR 3,500 and INR 7,200. Candidates need to pay fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat. Tamil Nadu Open University fees include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Caution fee is one-time payable at the time of admission.  The fee excludes caution deposit of INR 300.

faqs.question: What is the duration of Diploma courses at TNOU?
faqs.answer: TNOU offers one or two years diploma. Candidates must pass Class 10 to apply for diploma. The university selects candidates for this course based on the aspirant's qualifying exam scores.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for an MBA programme at TNOU?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 along with a bachelor's degree from any recognised university to apply for TNOU MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents such as marksheets, certificates, etc. proving their claim for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the selection for MBA is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at TNOU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Tamil Nadu Open University offers MBA programme for two-years at the PG level. The course is offered in semester pattern with curriculum divided into four semesters. Aspirants need to pass graduation to apply for MBA course. The selection for MBA is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How to join Tamil Nadu Open University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to TNOU offered courses, candidates must meet the eligibility conditions and complete the application process. Admission to the courses is merit-based, i.e. , applicants' performance in the last qualifying examination is evaluated. For B.Ed Spl.Ed., MPhil and PhD courses, candidates have to appear for an entrance exam conducted by the university. TNOU releases a rank list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates. Selected candidates need to participate in the admission counselling.

faqs.question: How much is the fee at TNOU?
faqs.answer: TNOU fees include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Caution fee is one-time payable at the time of admission. Furthermore, a 100% fee concession is given to jail inmates, transgenders, and destitute windows students. But the convocation fee has to be paid. Find below top TNOU courses along with their fee:Course NameOne-Time FeeTuition FeeMBANAINR 24,800 - INR 1 lakhBScINR 300INR 15,600 - INR 22,000MScNAINR 6,500 - INR 25,800BCANAINR 28,100BComNAINR 9,000 - INR 12,800After 10th DiplomaINR 300INR 3,500 - INR 7,200BANAINR 3,000-INR 10,800Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: When does TNOU conducts entrance exam for B.Ed Special Education?
faqs.answer: Tamil Nadu Open University selects candidates for B.Ed Special Education based on entrance exam score. The university conducts the entrance exam inJanuary.Below are the tentative dates for TNOU entrance exam:EventDateDate of entrance examLast week of Jan of the admission yearAnnouncement of Entrance Examination Results Cut-offmarksLast week of Jan of the admission year

faqs.question: When do admissions begin for various courses at Tamil Nadu Open University?
faqs.answer: Admissions are conducted twice between January and June. Admission to the courses is primarily merit-based. Moreover, the admission process is completely online. Hence, candidates can fill out and submit the application form via online mode through the Tamil Nadu Open University official website (tnou. ac.in). In addition, the university has set up 12 regional centres throughout Tamil Nadu to assist students in the application process.

placement_data.title: TNOU Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: As per the annual report 2022-23, 291 graduates received offer letters with reasonable salary. A total of 30,594 students participated and 5,235 were offered job opportunities , with a 17% success rate. The TNOU average package was between INR 2.50 LPA and INR 3.50 LPA . A total of 63 organisations participated during Tamil Nadu Open University placements 2023.

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at TNOU?
faqs.answer: TNOU does not refunds programme fee once paid by the candidates. However, if on scrutiny, the applicant is found ineligible for admission to his or her programme of choice, an amount of INR 500 is with held by the university as processing fee. The balance amount of the fee already paid to the university is refunded to the applicant in such case.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by St. Peter's CollegeReviewed on 23 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good College with best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department is well-equipped with quality labs. Smart classrooms are there. In hostels, rooms are given on a shared basis with the facility of Wi-Fi. There is also a mess and a canteen for Vegetarian and non vegetarian food. A medical facility is also there in emergency times.

Top-notch medical facilities are there, and sports and games are conducted like cricket, volleyball, and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges in Goa with good facilities, infrastructure, and the best teachers.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements provided in our college. After 4 years of studies, everyone has to serve a paid internship followed by a bond year, after which if we can answer NEET PG to get the PG seats. There are 9 departments and has 2-3 PG seats each. It is difficult to get a PG seat.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college and hospital are operated together. There are only a few lecture rooms. The library is good, and the canteen is very good. The food served is clean and affordable. Labs are also quite good. But books and other items have to be bought by self. There are network issues in college.

individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Goa with good facilities, infrastructure, and the best teachers.

content.Placements: There are no placements provided in our college. After 4 years of studies, everyone has to serve a paid internship followed by a bond year, after which if we can answer NEET PG to get the PG seats. There are 9 departments and has 2-3 PG seats each. It is difficult to get a PG seat.
content.Infrastructure: The college and hospital are operated together. There are only a few lecture rooms. The library is good, and the canteen is very good. The food served is clean and affordable. Labs are also quite good. But books and other items have to be bought by self. There are network issues in college.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty, centrally located, great patient flow with good exposure.

review_content.Placements: Every passout either goes ahead for MDS, opts to open a clinic, or work for one. They are well qualified and trained during the internship program in the college itself, which is a hospital with great patient flow and exposure for students. The students are trained under the supervision of the teachers. As such, there are no placements in dental college.
review_content.Infrastructure: We do have high-speed Wi-Fi, classrooms are spacious and comfortable with 5000+ books in the library along with an e-library. Hostel rooms are good, they could be better . They are a little smaller . There are 2 types of rooms. One with washrooms in the room and 4 people living together, and the other is a washroom outside the room with 2 people living together. There are no mess facilities in the college, but there are catering services which provide tiffins to the students. Canteens are good and affordable also in the vicinity of the hostel and college . Good exposure to sports via competitions. There is a huge ground which many matches take place.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best dental colleges in Pune, Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Students can start their own clinic after BDS or can also opt for MS. For MS, you need to appear for NEET MS. There are various MS courses available at MARDC, such as MS orthodontics, MS oral surgery, MS endodontics, MS prosthodontics, MS periodontics and MS pedodontics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. It has various facilities like a library, e-library, huge classrooms, various labs, dissection hall, unlimited Wi-Fi connectivity, canteens, auditorium, playground, etc. The drawback is underground basement classrooms.

college_info.intro: LUVAS offers courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, along with Diploma courses. The popular programmes at LUVAS Hisar include B.E./ B.Tech and BVSC.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences courses are offered to students mainly in the field of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry, and Dairy Technology. The university offers UG, PG, and PhD courses, along with diploma courses. Further, the LUVAS courses are offered to students in full-time mode and are approved by the Veterinary Council of India (VCI).

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a well-experienced teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is good, with some of our seniors running their successful clinics and hospitals. The internship is done in various institutions and places all over India. Regular clinical exposure is experienced by us students, which helps a lot.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are decent with optimal lighting, air conditioners, and fans. Spacious cupboards are provided and each student gets their individual chair and table. The quality of mess food is also good with a variety in the menu available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A good college for veterinarians in India and has really good clinical infrastructure and teachers.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario at our college is just average. This year, 3–4 pass-out students from BVSC got placement in foreign countries like Australia, New Zealand and Mauritius. The placement depends more on the clinical knowledge of the student than on their CGPA. So overall, if you're good in clinics during your internship, you'll get placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are very well-equipped and the hospital is also the main government animal hospital in Haryana, so cases from the nearby districts come regularly, so the students get a lot of practical exposure. The Nehru Library is also one of the best in the state and has a collection of over 40,000 books. The hostel facility is something that needs to be improved. The hostel buildings are very old but you can easily get PG outside.

answer.text: Professionals in the field of Dairy Technology continuously hunt for fresh and innovative methods for the production and processing of dairy items. They bring together different elements of Chemistry, Microbiology, Engineering, and Nutrition to make sure the final dairy product is healthy, meets the required quality standards, and provides enough nutrition to the people of India, who are highly dependent on milk and its products. review_summary.college_name: LUVAS Hisar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Veterinary and Animal Sciences - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college in our local area that connects humans to animals.

content.Placements: There are 60 seats in our college. Generally, there is no regular package for students. Some medical companies hire the students, but very few local companies do. Above 60 percent of students got internships. Best for educational purposes or practical work. Overall good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and quality of the buildings are very good. Many good facilities like Wi-Fi, hostel room facilities, digital classrooms, practical medicine lab, a big dairy farm, a good playground, etc., are available. Library facilities for students. Good water facility and washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Help the helpless animals.

content.Placements: In our course, placements are not there, but we have a B. Tech in dairy technology, where placement is 100%. The B. Tech batch of 25 students all get a job by placements with a handsome package of about 5-8 LPA. An internship program is there in our course for 1 year, and it is only for veterinary graduate students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good as our hostels are government-hosted, so the fee is very low, around Rs.7,000-Rs.10,000 per year, and electricity and water are free. The mess is run by the students itself so the food is also good. The hostel has free Wi-Fi and a 24/7 canteen. There is a volleyball ground, a cricket ground, and a common room for indoor games in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has a well-experienced teaching faculty.

content.Placements: The placement rate is good, with some of our seniors running their successful clinics and hospitals. The internship is done in various institutions and places all over India. Regular clinical exposure is experienced by us students, which helps a lot.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are decent with optimal lighting, air conditioners, and fans. Spacious cupboards are provided and each student gets their individual chair and table. The quality of mess food is also good with a variety in the menu available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good college for veterinarians in India and has really good clinical infrastructure and teachers.

content.Placements: The placement scenario at our college is just average. This year, 3–4 pass-out students from BVSC got placement in foreign countries like Australia, New Zealand and Mauritius. The placement depends more on the clinical knowledge of the student than on their CGPA. So overall, if you're good in clinics during your internship, you'll get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are very well-equipped and the hospital is also the main government animal hospital in Haryana, so cases from the nearby districts come regularly, so the students get a lot of practical exposure. The Nehru Library is also one of the best in the state and has a collection of over 40,000 books. The hostel facility is something that needs to be improved. The hostel buildings are very old but you can easily get PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very good facilities.

content.Placements: Placing % depends on how you performed in your professional years. Every student has to do an internship program from the college in which the college or the government pays you every month for your expenses. The internship program in my college is the best in INDIA.
content.Infrastructure: In class, updated technology like projectors and TV screens are available for study purposes. Our college offers the biggest library in Asia. The quality of food is good and very affordable, with free medical facilities. There is one mandatory sports class every week.

The institute is ranked #37 in the Agriculture and Allied Sectors category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences rankings:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Haryana In 2025

nirf.description:
Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences fell 3 ranks to #37 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 16 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has a well-experienced teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are decent with optimal lighting, air conditioners, and fans. Spacious cupboards are provided and each student gets their individual chair and table. The quality of mess food is also good with a variety in the menu available.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for veterinarians in India and has really good clinical infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The labs are very well-equipped and the hospital is also the main government animal hospital in Haryana, so cases from the nearby districts come regularly, so the students get a lot of practical exposure. The Nehru Library is also one of the best in the state and has a collection of over 40,000 books. The hostel facility is something that needs to be improved. The hostel buildings are very old but you can easily get PG outside.

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: In class, updated technology like projectors and TV screens are available for study purposes. Our college offers the biggest library in Asia. The quality of food is good and very affordable, with free medical facilities. There is one mandatory sports class every week.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for veterinary education.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel facility, rooms are every day clean. Good to study, and greenery is everywhere, electricity service is good and one more thing meal is so healthy and hygiene. Drinking water is very clean in the hostel separate study room, a separate playground, and a good lawn.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 9 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission here if you want to live your life.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi and food of mess is also unhygienic. Students feel scarred in college hostel. Wardons are more than the worst. You can't go outside college capmus after 8:00pm. Security money is also not given returned and it is engulfed by college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: A college for fulfilling your dreams.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but no Wi-Fi is there. Classrooms have Android screen and the library is good. Hostel’s food quality is good. Canteen has limited food variety. Limited sports and games facility is there. Medical facilities are not so good. Mess’s sitting arrangement is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 1 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best private college for veterinary.
reviews.review_text: Clinics, Parasitology lab, physiology lab, pathology lab, microbiology lab, smart classrooms, and a centralised air-conditioned library are available. There are mess facilities in the hostel. Quality of food is good. Proper medical facilities are provided. Ground for volleyball, football, cricket, etc. are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 25 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good experience and the infrastructure and facilities of the college are okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The classroom conditions are good and also well provided with a smart board. Apart from the college building, there is another building for clinics in which you study the clinical subjects and attend the animal patients.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 21 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good choice for your career.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well-equipped with an android screen, well furnished, and has good lighting. The library is good with centrally air-conditioned labs are good with the latest tech and equipment. The hostel is good, mess provides good quality food, the canteen is also good. Sports and games are held in sports fest meet.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty members but lacks the exposure of a real veterinary college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fine. The laboratories have the proper equipment that is needed. But there is no ventilation in classes which makes situations worse during the summer season. Also, it offers libraries that lack books. The hostel is provided on the campus but it is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: College is the same as a boarding school. No transportation is available.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, no proper quality of food, no AC at classes, canteen have nothing to eat. Hard benches in class and lab have hard stools to sit. Labs lack equipment and classrooms environment are not suitable for studies. A small library is there but closed for months. AC rooms are available but at a very expensive price with poor quality food and no medical facilities and canteen have only tea and soft drinks. Lack of sports equipment and 2-3 games only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent teachers, resources, good clinical cases but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well built for the accommodation of students, and provide enough space for the students to be comfortable. Laboratories are equipped with the necessary equipment required for teaching. The library is also good with various categories of books available. There is no provision of Wi-Fi for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Ideal Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 5 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It has poor management, hostel and facilities, and average teachers, but the fee is high.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are below average. Cold water is available for bath even in winters, and 8-9 students are adjusted in one room. There is no library, and the classrooms are average. There is no canteen, and the mess kitchen is small. Only a volleyball court is available.

college_info.intro: HIMT College of Pharmacy provides various undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes in pharmacy. The courses provided by the college include D.Pharm., B.Pharm, and M.Pharm. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of HIMT College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students got placed in well-reputed companies in the pharmacy field. The salary package offered was 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Many companies hired students in the core fields such as Cipla, GVK, GSK, Mankind, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were provided in our college. Wi-Fi was provided on every floor in every block. There were separate hostels for boys and girls with proper food facilities. It had a central library and separate libraries in every block.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of HIMT College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: About 99% of students are placed at reputed pharmaceutical companies. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the lowest is about 2.7 LPA. A job fair is conducted by the college, at which many pharmaceutical companies hire students according to their capabilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and is maintained very well by the management of the college. Wi-Fi access is available on all floors. Labs are equipped with the latest models of every machine that is used in any pharmaceutical company.

courses.overview: HIMT College of Pharmacy Courses & Fees 2025 There are a total of 5 courses offered at by the institute. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Pharmacy is a beneficial course in the budget.

content.Placements: I am currently studying at the HIMT College of Pharmacy, and my course is B.Pharma. The highest package offered by the college is 5 LPA, and the lowest is approximately 2.7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are Alembic Limited, Ranbaxy Ltd., Cipla Ltd., and Alkem Laboratories Ltd.
content.Infrastructure: HIMT College of Pharmacy offers a range of facilities and infrastructure to support its Pharmacy program. These include well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a comprehensive library, and a computer lab with internet access. Additionally, the college provides a canteen, sports facilities, and medical services. The college also provides a properly functioning hostel with Wi-Fi and food facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: HIMT college location is good because a police station and metro station are nearby.

content.Placements: HIMT College of Pharmacy offers good placements according to Hindustan Times. Good salary packages are offered by foreign companies, ranging from 3 LPA to 15 LPA. Some faculty members prepare students for interviews, provide management training, and offer guidance for their aspirations.
content.Infrastructure: HIMT College has good infrastructure and well-maintained library, hostels, labs, and sports area. All blocks are provided with medical facilities, and Wi-Fi is available in college. Labs are well-equipped, and separate hostels are provided. The canteen provides hygienic snacks.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of HIMT College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students got placed in well-reputed companies in the pharmacy field. The salary package offered was 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Many companies hired students in the core fields such as Cipla, GVK, GSK, Mankind, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were provided in our college. Wi-Fi was provided on every floor in every block. There were separate hostels for boys and girls with proper food facilities. It had a central library and separate libraries in every block.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of HIMT College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: About 99% of students are placed at reputed pharmaceutical companies. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the lowest is about 2.7 LPA. A job fair is conducted by the college, at which many pharmaceutical companies hire students according to their capabilities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and is maintained very well by the management of the college. Wi-Fi access is available on all floors. Labs are equipped with the latest models of every machine that is used in any pharmaceutical company.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A good college for pharmacy near greater Noida.

content.Placements: The average of students get placed is 20 out of fifty as per past five years data, this may also because of covid 19 wave in India. As per freshers entry the package for pharmacist is 16-25k per month, the highest package was 27-28k in past few years during covid HIMT college also conduct job fair so, there are lots of industrial and healthcare company visit for recruitment of employees, companies are hindustan wellness and more. There is very high average for internship as the our course schedule the industrial training so, its mandatory to do.
content.Infrastructure: There are decent facilities not as lower and not too much expensive You have excess of a small cantein and there are 6-7 building for different courses the well developed labs and nursery, animal husbandry and a decent area of basketball and hand ball court There are some raw area for playing sports like kabadi and for preparing for sports days tournaments.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Assam Medical College are approved by eminent Government bodies like NMC, AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Assam Medical College goes up to 503.

reviews_list.review_title: I am mostly satisfied with the infrastructure and events and environment of the college.

review_content.Placements: It is a medical college, and it has many different courses like MBBS, post-graduation, B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharma, M.Pharma and many others like BDS, etc. This year, super speciality courses are also started. AMCH offers internships on the campus only.
review_content.Infrastructure: AMCH was established in 1887, so its infrastructure is most of like British time. However, now many new infrastructural facilities are under construction like cancer hospital, maternity and child health care centre, etc. Hostels facilities along with mess are available for every course.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is the oldest college and needs some improvement.

review_content.Placements: It's a medical college, and you won't run out of opportunities. You can choose from the government as well as private companies. There are many options, you can join as a private doctor, and we can also have a boat clinic. The lowest salary offered would be Rs. 35,000 per month. The highest salary offered will be 1 lac per month depending on your duty schedule.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility in hostels. The library is open for 12 hours, but it is closed on week offs. Sports facilities are provided. Labs are good. Teachers are good but not the best. They are not too friendly like the teachers in the north region. The food served in the canteen is average. Rest of the other things are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a great environment for learning.

review_content.Placements: There are no direct placements provided from the college. However, every student is given a year-long internship programme in Assam itself. Students can either go for further studies or get a job in that area after the internship. But as a doctor, it is preferable to go for higher studies after MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and medical facilities are available in the college. Quality of classrooms needs to be improved, and the hostel rooms are really good. Canteens are available in the entire college area. The infrastructure needs to be improved as it is a really old college.

individual_reviews.title: It has a beautiful environment. Faculty members are really supportive.

content.Placements: Assam Medical College and Hospital (AMCH), being a government medical institution, does not follow the traditional corporate-style placement system like engineering or management colleges. Instead, every MBBS student undergoes a compulsory one-year rotatory internship at the college hospital after completing the academic part.
content.Infrastructure: Assam Medical College offers well-equipped lecture halls, demonstration rooms, Wi-Fi access, advanced laboratories, and a large central library with ample study materials. Hostels have decent infrastructure with basic amenities. The mess provides average food. Medical facilities are easily accessible. There are provisions for sports and games like volleyball, cricket, and indoor activities.

Research activities are also there in this college.

paragraphs: Assam Medical College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Assam Medical College considers scores in NEET, NEET PG, and AHSEC for admission to specific courses.Assam Medical Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels.

The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 90,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 35,000 - 58,500. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.question: How many entrance exam cutoffs will be released for admission to MBBS at Assam Medical College?
faqs.answer: Assam Medical College will release 4-5 rounds of NEET cutoffs for admission to medical courses. The cutoffs will be released on a rolling basis, and the seats will be filled on a first-come, first-served basis. The cutoffs will be based on the following factors:The NEET score of the candidateThe category of the candidateThe number of seats available in the courseCandidates must visit the official website of entrance exam to read clear instructions on how to proceed with the counselling process,

hostel_campus.college_name: Assam Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has a beautiful environment. Faculty members are really supportive.
reviews.review_text: Assam Medical College offers well-equipped lecture halls, demonstration rooms, Wi-Fi access, advanced laboratories, and a large central library with ample study materials. Hostels have decent infrastructure with basic amenities. The mess provides average food. Medical facilities are easily accessible. There are provisions for sports and games like volleyball, cricket, and indoor activities.

reviews.review_heading: My college review for my dream college.
reviews.review_text: This is the oldest medical college in the entire North East India. It has good quality modern infrastructure, providing the best health care facilities in the upper Assam region. Classrooms have digital boards, AC, well-planned seating arrangements, etc. Hostels are pretty good. They are provided with fans, lights, a balcony, beds, study tables, and wardrobes.

reviews.review_heading: I am mostly satisfied with the infrastructure and events and environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: AMCH was established in 1887, so its infrastructure is most of like British time. However, now many new infrastructural facilities are under construction like cancer hospital, maternity and child health care centre, etc. Hostels facilities along with mess are available for every course.

reviews.review_heading: It is the oldest college and needs some improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi facility in hostels. The library is open for 12 hours, but it is closed on week offs. Sports facilities are provided. Labs are good. Teachers are good but not the best. They are not too friendly like the teachers in the north region. The food served in the canteen is average. Rest of the other things are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a great environment for learning.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, and medical facilities are available in the college. Quality of classrooms needs to be improved, and the hostel rooms are really good. Canteens are available in the entire college area. The infrastructure needs to be improved as it is a really old college.

reviews.review_heading:
Good placements in 2024
Really good infrastructure clean and hygience area 
Facilities excellent .
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious with modern infrastructure. Classrooms are large, well-ventilated, and equipped with audio-visual aids. Laboratories are well-equipped for practical classes. Hostels are sizable, clean, and well-maintained with separate accommodation for boys and girls. The hostels come with 24-hour electricity, running water, and CCTV security. Mess food is considered average, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and a monthly cost of around Rs. 1,500- Rs. 2,000. The college ca...

reviews_list.review_title: Good College with every facility.

review_content.Placements: As being a Medical College, there is no direct campus placements. My batch had 45 students - some are doing higher studies, some are practicing as in their private clinics, while some are practicing in collaboration with some hospitals. Internship is there itself in college hospital with all the clinical exposure. Students used to have academic activities like - debate competition, poster competition, quiz competition, research projects; on the other hand there are many of co-curricular activities like - sports, annual gatherings, dance, singing, plays, etc. Over all a complete personality development of individual.

college_info.college_name: SRM Dental College Kattankulathur: Courses, Fees, Admission 2024, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, SRM Dental College ranks #32 under the category 'Dental'.

The NEET MDS 2026 exam date has been set as May 2, 2026 (tentatively) for SRM Dental College admission to the MDS course. The registrations for the same are expected to start soon.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
SRM Dental College Kattankulathur popular programmes are BDS and MDS. BDS and MDS students are placed in top companies and hospitals such as Apollo Clinic, FMS Dental Hospitals, Clove Dental, and others. BDS and MDS students are trained to become Dental professionals and hence treat oral and dental issues. After completing a course from this college, students can also pursue teaching, and several research opportunities get aligned for them. Students are taught specialised skills so that they can have good career in the Dental stream.
Overall, SRM Dental College Kattankulathur is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by SRM Dental College Kattankulathur and their respective eligibility and SRM Kattankulathur Dental College MDS fees structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, BDS graduates of SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital can explore various job opportunities in the government sector. These jobs provide job security, stability and recognition in addition to amazing salary packages and perks. Listed below are the government job opportunities for SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital BDS graduates:Dental Surgeon positions in Government Hospitals, Community Health Centers (CHCs), and Primary Health Centers (PHCs)Army Dental Corps (Indian Army)Dental Surge
faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BDS at SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Dental College (KTR) has a decent placement record for BDS. However, the placement rate over the past few years has been less than 100%. With an average salary package of around INR 6 LPA, the college has maintained a placement rate of over 70%. According to SRM KTR Dental College reviews on Shiksha.com, the placement rate for BDS over the years ranges between 80% - 95%. Candidates can refer to the following table presenting the number of BDS students placed in 2021,  2022 and 2023 as
faqs.question: Does SRM Dental College Kattankulathur offer 100% placements to BDS students?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, there are multiple government jobs that students can seek after completing MDS at SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital. These jobs provide job security, stability and recognition in addition to amazing salary packages and perks. faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing MDS at SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Dental College Kattankulathur (KTR) has a total intake of 18 students for its MDS programme. These seats are further distributed among the MDS specialisations offered at the college. The college offers six specialisations under the MDS programme. There are three seat available for each specialisation. These seats are filled through the MCC NEET MDS counselling based on the NEET MDS scores of the applicants. The mentioned seat information is sourced from the official website of the coll
faqs.question: What is the student intake at SRM KTR Dental College for MDS?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SRM Dental College Kattankulathur offers PG and UG programmes to students. These courses are provided across the Dental and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BDS programmes to students. At the PG level, the college provides MDS programmes to students. MDS is provided in 6 specialisations. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by SRM Dental College Kattankulathur and their respective eligibility and SRM Kattankulathur Dental College MDS fees structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees of BDS is INR 15.6 lakh at SRM Dental College Kattankulathur. Candidates are required to pay the first instalment of the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates are also required to pay a registration fee of INR 10,000 at admission. This information is sourced from official website of the college/sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BDS at SRM Dental College, Kattankulathur?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM KTR Dental College and Hospital offers admission to 100 students for the first year of its Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) courses. These seats are filled through the MCC NEET UG counselling based on the NEET UG scores of the applicants. The mentioned seat information is sourced from the official website of the college/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How many B.DS seats are available at SRM KTR Dental College?

faqs.answer: A:    NEET MDS is the accepted entrance exam for SRM Kattankulathur (KTR) Dental College MDS admission. The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS) has not yet released the complete exam schedule for the NEET MDS 2026 application process.
faqs.question: When can I apply for the entrance exam for MDS admission at SRM Kattankulathur (KTR) Dental College?

faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fees of MDS at SRM Dental College Kattankulathur depends on the MDS specialisation chosen by the candidates. Candidates are required to pay the first instalment of the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In addition to the tuition fee, they must pay a registration fee of INR 10,000 at admission (same for all specialisations). reviews_list.review_title: It is not worth the money because teaching is the worst here.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students got placed and 2% of students got internships from my course. Roles offered are perfusionists on the clinical side, tutor, and lecturer. This course offered the highest salary of Rs. 40,000 per month, and the average salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. The lowest salary is Rs. 15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in both classrooms and hostels everywhere around the college. The quality of food in the hostel is too good but it has too many dishes. The canteen food is very costly and the taste is also average. We have all facilities in our college.

review_content.Infrastructure: It was excellent in the hostel and food facilities. They will provide free Wi-Fi everywhere, the labs, library and classrooms are good. Fees is 1.3 lakh and study rooms are present. Sports and games are plenty in our college. Classrooms are fully AC.

Although last year the result date was stated to be declared on June 14, NTA released it 10 days in advance. Hence, there is no fixed date or schedule for NTA to declare the NEET result. Prior to the declaration of the result, NTA releases the final NEET answer key. Last year, NEET was conducted on May 5 and the result was declared June 4.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MDS course is available at SRM Dental College Kattankulathur. SRM Dental College Kattankulathur offers a three-year MDS course at the PG level.
