overview_faqs.question: Is MDS available at SRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, a full-time Master of Dental Surgery (MDS) is available at SRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital (university campus). The duration of the PG-level programme is three year, and it is offered in six secialisations. A stipend is paid to students throughout the course. With an NIRF ranking of #32 (Dental Category; 2024), SRM KTR Dental College offers 18 seats under its MDS course. The course is recognised by the Dental Council of India. The total tuition fee for MDS at the college ranges between INR 27 Lacs and INR 42 lakh. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: SRM Dental College Kattankulathur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, friendly staff, and amazing environment.

content.Placements: The course offers good placement opportunities. About 80% of students are placed in good companies and about 80-90% of students got internship from our course. Each year more than 700 companies visit our university to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures and facilities are good. Fully air conditioned and clean classrooms are there. Hostel facilities are also good. Many events and sports are also conducted in our college. Medical facilities are available for any medical emergency. Sports and games are good. Campus is full of greenery and has a wonderful environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very much happy to be a part in srm kattankulathur dental College family.

content.Placements: We have the effective one year practice section in our college during 5th year that helps in our placement. So we have a excellent and secured life in SRM. College provide all the possible way to build up our students career. We can also get influence from most of the admiring doctors.
content.Infrastructure: We have well furnished class room and even our campus have wonderful environment with ever glowing construction. We have well furnished hostel which is well maintained we also has some other extra facilities in our hostel. We have a full secured life in SRM.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is not worth the money because teaching is the worst here.

content.Placements: 10% of students got placed and 2% of students got internships from my course. Roles offered are perfusionists on the clinical side, tutor, and lecturer. This course offered the highest salary of Rs. 40,000 per month, and the average salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. The lowest salary is Rs. 15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in both classrooms and hostels everywhere around the college. The quality of food in the hostel is too good but it has too many dishes. The canteen food is very costly and the taste is also average. We have all facilities in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: It is too good for placements in top recruitments and a good career for everyone. More than 95% students have been placed from our college this year. The scope is good in this college. In our college, the fee structure is low. The Free Wi-Fi is everywhere and good.
content.Infrastructure: It was excellent in the hostel and food facilities. They will provide free Wi-Fi everywhere, the labs, library and classrooms are good. Fees is 1.3 lakh and study rooms are present. Sports and games are plenty in our college. Classrooms are fully AC.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of good teaching infrastructure, work, course.

content.Placements: Everything is good and all the students who are passing out get jobs easily. They start their clinics and stand on their legs. Foreign opportunities are also available for BDS students. They are also becoming tutors or lecturers.
content.Infrastructure: This college has well-air-conditioned classrooms, labs, a great library, etc. In the hostel, the food is good & the rooms are much more comfortable, we have an indoor game room, tv room, study hall, and gym. And good medical facilities. There is much safety.

admission_process.title: SRM Kattankulathur Dental College & Hospital Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SRM Dental College Kattankulathur admission 2025is decided entrance exam scores. The college offers BDS and MDS courses at the UG and PG level. The college offers BA courses at the UG level. Not only the UG and PG course, the college also offers doctorate-level courses. For enrollement to theSRM Dental College Kattankulathur, students should satisf the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at the SRM Dental College Kattankulathur is conducted online. Read the further details to understand aboutSRM Dental College Kattankulathur course admission2025.

The tuition fee for complete BDS and MDS course at SRM Dental College Kattankulathur ranges between INR 15.6 lakh-INR 42 lakh. Students can check the course-wise tuition fee and ROI from the represented columns:

A total of of 100 seats are available for the BDS course at SRM Dental College Kattankulathu. Similarly, 18 seats are available for MDS course. For exact info, students can also check the table below:
Course Name
SRM Dental College Kattankulathur admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. students must follow the given guide:
1: Eligibility
To be eligible for admission, students must have qualified for the NEET and NEET-PG for BD and MDS courses, respectively
2: Application Process

Aspirants must visit the official exam website to apply for the exam. students must register online at www.mcc.nic.in for All India Quota (AIQ) counselling. Aspirants must also complete payment for registration and a refundable security deposit. students can also check detailedNEET UG applicationandNEET PG applicationprocedure here.
3: Choice Filling
During the initial round of choice filling, students should select SRM Kattankulathur Dental College as their first choice.
4: Seat Allotment

MCC releases the seat allotment lists on its official website. First, a provisional result will be released and students are allowed to submit objections, if any. Later, the final seat allotment list is released. These lists are based on the choices filled by the applicants, their NEET ranks and the availability of seats. students can either accept the allotted college or register for further counselling rounds if they want to upgrade their allocated college.
5: Reporting to the college
6: Counseling Rounds

The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 79521 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
SRM Dental College BDS cutoff 2025 was 79521 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

SRM Dental College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Round 1 Seat allotment result is out for NEET PG. Candidate must report the allocated institute between Aug 8 to Aug 14 to complete the registration formalites. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out theSRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital University Main Campus latest cutoff trends:

For the General AI category candidates, the last cutoff ranged from 4511 to 13604. Among all the available specialisations, the one that turned out to be the most competitive was , with a closing rank of . In

Students can check the table below to know the cutoff details for other categories, specialisations, rounds, etc.

highlights.description: SRM Dental College is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #39 by the NIRF 2025 under the category Dental. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the SRM Dental College rankings.

nirf.description:
SRM Dental College has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Dental' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SRM Dental College indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, SRM Dental College fell 7 ranks to #39 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, friendly staff, and amazing environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures and facilities are good. Fully air conditioned and clean classrooms are there. Hostel facilities are also good. Many events and sports are also conducted in our college. Medical facilities are available for any medical emergency. Sports and games are good. Campus is full of greenery and has a wonderful environment.

reviews.review_heading: Very much happy to be a part in srm kattankulathur dental College family.
reviews.review_text: We have well furnished class room and even our campus have wonderful environment with ever glowing construction. We have well furnished hostel which is well maintained we also has some other extra facilities in our hostel. We have a full secured life in SRM.

reviews.review_heading: It is not worth the money because teaching is the worst here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in both classrooms and hostels everywhere around the college. The quality of food in the hostel is too good but it has too many dishes. The canteen food is very costly and the taste is also average. We have all facilities in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: It was excellent in the hostel and food facilities. They will provide free Wi-Fi everywhere, the labs, library and classrooms are good. Fees is 1.3 lakh and study rooms are present. Sports and games are plenty in our college. Classrooms are fully AC.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good teaching infrastructure, work, course.
reviews.review_text: This college has well-air-conditioned classrooms, labs, a great library, etc. In the hostel, the food is good & the rooms are much more comfortable, we have an indoor game room, tv room, study hall, and gym. And good medical facilities. There is much safety.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for BDS and a hospital.
reviews.review_text: The surroundings of the college are pretty great, it has everything in its locality. There is a gym, restaurant, hotels, turf, Game Centre, cafes and a lot of exploring options around the college. I stayed in the hostel for 3 years. They only have a very limited number of AC rooms. And you cannot get a single room. The food quality is terrible. There are many departments like the pharmacology department, pathology department, biochemistry department, microbiology depth, moral pathology departmen...

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM Dental College, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library in Chennai, which consists of all the old and new books. Classrooms are spacious, and all the lecture halls are smart. The hostel is not up to the mark, and the food served will be pathetic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital University Main Campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided excellent facilities. A library was available. A good collection of books was available in the library. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Medical and canteen facilities were available. Hostels were separate for girls and boys. The hostel had good atmosphere. The warden was good, and safety was assured.

reviews.review_heading: I'm proud be a part of SRM.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good. The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our department and hostel have free Wi-Fi. The classrooms are very good. The hostel rooms are very good. There is a gym, TV hall, indoor games, separate study rooms, and a mess. The food is good, and there are only 2-3 dishes. Students from different states come here.

data.description: Yes, a full-time Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) is available at SRM Kattankulathur Dental College and Hospital (university campus). The duration of the programme is five year, including a compulsory internship of one year. A stipend is paid to students during the internship. With an NIRF ranking of #32 (Dental Category; 2024), SRM KTR Dental College offers 100 seats for its BDS course. The course is recognised by the Dental Council of India. The total tuition fee for BDS at the college is INR 15.6 lakh. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

college_info.intro:
Swami Vivekanand University MP gives UG and PG courses across multiple streams such as Education, Law, Science, Hotel Management, Nursing, etc. The popular programmes at Vivekanand University Sagar are MBA, BSc, and BTech.
Vivekanand University MP has a full-time, 4-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech courses given at the university cover courses in the areas of Mechanical, Civil, Electrical and Electronics, Agriculture, Information Technology, etc. The MBA programme given by the Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Madhya Pradesh is a 2-year programme. It is given in several specialisations, including Fire and Safety Management, Disaster Management, and Hotel Management.
Vivekanand University Sagar MP also gives several programmes in distance learnig mode. Below mentioned are Swami Vivekanand University popular programmes:

The university has a placement cell that facilitates the placement process. Many companies visit the university every year for placements.The university provides internships for students after the 2nd semester.The average salary package for B.Tech students is 3.5 Lacs per annum.

review_content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. It is a top-rated university in the Sagar district, and reputable companies like RSPL Limited actively hire talent from this institute. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur etc. are some of the top recruiters in the placement drive at the campus. The institute also offers scholarships to the poor, needy as well as meritorious students as per the scholarship programmes by the government. Students have to apply for the scholarships at the starting of the academic session with the required documents.
faqs.question: Q: Is Swami Vivekanand University UGC approved?

faqs.answer: The admissions for Swami Vivekanand University have been going on, but the application form date has passed.The privately owned Swami Vivekananda University, popularly known as SVU, was established in 2019. Swami Vivekananda University is situated in Barrackpore, West Bengal. Public transit connects it to the main city extremely well. The university offers top-notch instruction in a range of subject areas.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions open in Swami Vivekanand University?

faqs.answer: The various courses offered at Swami Vivekanand University:Bachelor of Technology [B.Tech]Bachelor of Science [B.Sc]Master of Business Administration [MBA]Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.)Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.)Diploma in Medical Lab Technology (DMLT)Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm.)Bachelor of Science [B.Sc] {Hons.}B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Civil, Electrical & Electronics, Electronics & Communication
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at SVC - Swami Vivekanand University?

faqs.answer: Yes, Swami Vivekanand University offers a Bachelor of Technology or BTech among other undegraduate courses. It is offered in the full-time mode through the university's Faculty of Engineering. The duration of the course is four years and it follows a semester pattern. The university offers a BTech under various specialisations, such as Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mining Engineering, etc. Admission to the programme is subject to the fulfilment of the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria. For more information, candidates must directly contact the university's admission office.
faqs.question: Q: Does Swami Vivekanand University, Sagar offer BTech?

To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the SVN University Sagar admission process must pay the course fee.

course_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at Swami Vivekanand University Sagar?
course_faqs.answer: The fee range for the MBA program at Swami Vivekanand University Sagar lies between INR 80,000 to 1,00,000 for the whole course. But, the hostel fee is not included. This is only Tuition fees. Exam Fee: INR 1400 is charged extra and INR 1200 is the One-time Payment including Enrollment Fee and Registration Fee. The fee structure may change over time, so it's advisable to check the official website for further updates.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for two-year MBA in Swami Vivekanand University?

overview_faqs.question: Is Swami Vivekanand University UGC approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur e

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty.

content.Placements: No placement and no company ever visit for my course. The students have to do their internship by themselves, and no support is provided by the college. In course, the internship can be done with own money. I have done my internship from TTC Hisar with the amount of 10,000 rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .

content.Placements: Only 2 or 3 students from the whole batch were placed, with not-so-handsome packages, and no big giants' companies came to recruit the students. Internships are available if you want to arrange them on your own in pharmaceutical industries and hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.

content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. It is a top-rated university in the Sagar district, and reputable companies like RSPL Limited actively hire talent from this institute. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.

content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar. If you're looking to take admission at this institution, that's good for your career. They have a good network with companies that hire many students from here. P&G's highest salary offer for an assistant manager role is over 7.64 lacs per year.
content.Infrastructure: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.

content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar City. They are a reputed institute. All local industries come to visit and hire. Most business sector companies hire from these; the highest salary is 7 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA at the university. The top role offered is manager.
content.Infrastructure: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

admission_overview.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Swami Vivekanand University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis as per the course. For online process, apply through the offcial website. The university offers various UG, PG, Diploma and certificate level courses. These courses are offered across various fields Science, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Computer Applications, etc. Also known as SVN University Sagar, the university is located in Madhya Pradesh. Read the following article to learn all about the admission procedure, courses, and admission criteria of Swami Vivekanand University.

eligibility_selection.title: Swami Vivekanand University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Swami Vivekanand University course admission is subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. Students wishing to enrol into the university need to make sure that they meet both the minimum educational qualifications and the selection criteria to get a seat. Admissions are primarily merit-based. The university may accept valid scores obtained in national or state-level entrance examinations. Further, students may have to participate in state-level counselling.

admission_process.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University's admission processinvolves application, selection, counselling (if applicable) and admission confirmation. Students need to satisfy the admission criteria to get admission into the university. The application process of the university commences online. Eligible students interested in applying can follow the s explained below to complete the admission process of Swami Vivekanand University.
Application and Registration
Log on to the official website and apply online by filling out the basic details.
Shortlisting Process

Students are mainly selected on a merit basis. However SVU Sagar may also consider entrance exam scores depending on the programme. Students need to provide scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. Exams such as CAT/ MAT can be taken into consideration for MBA admission. For certain courses students may have to participate in Gujarat counselling for seat allotment.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once a seat is offered students need to report for document verification. After that paythe feesfor seat confirmation.

The total tuition fees for the university's courses can include components like tuition fees, library fees, and more. Some of the SVN University fees are charged only once during the time of admissions, while the remaining are to be paid as per the university's guidelines. placement_data.title: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University placement brochure or report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the average package in recent placements ranged between INR 4 LPA and INR 7 LPA . Every year around 70% of the batch gets successfully placed . PhonePe, Adani Group, and Nike, among others were some of the leading companies that participated in Swami Vivekanand University placements over the past few years.

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand University (SVU) offers B.Tech placements with good opportunities for students. The university has a placement cell that facilitates the placement process. Many companies visit the university every year for placements. The university provides internships for students after the 2nd semester. The average salary package for B.Tech students is 3.5 Lacs per annum.

hostel_campus.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Academic Facilities: Well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and computer centers to support academic learning and research activities.
Hostel Accommodation: On-campus hostel facilities for students, especially those coming from different cities or states.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

reviews.review_heading: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.
reviews.review_text: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.
reviews.review_text: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is large with modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides modern infrastructure. The campus is well-designed. We have a library, a canteen, high technology classrooms, digital screens, Wi-Fi, etc. The hostel is good. It is near our college. It provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: SVN SAGAR campus life experience.
reviews.review_text: SVN provides a better experience on campus. The campus grounds are large and include a sports activity facility. The classroom is fully clean and equipped with an air conditioning facility. The hostel capacity at SVN is a maximum of 200 students. In a hostel, there is a bed, a fan in the rooms, 24*7 electricity, and no shortage of places in the hostel or compound. So the overall average development in the SVN Institute that students expect is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel provides no such facility. It provides ground for playing, and teachers were helpful. The classrooms were fine, and the library was also good. The food quality was not better. It also provides medical facilities. Sports and tournaments were held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I'm very much satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are quite good and helpful for students. Faculty members are willing to offer help. The hostels are average if we compare them to some private colleges, but are above average if compared to the college of the same city. A library facility is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. It provides good practice of field & practical knowledge
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the University is very good. Classrooms and labs are very clean. Large hall for programme, playground. For agriculture course, field practice is also available. Wi-fi facility also available in university. But currently, there is no hostel facility for students. Student can live in nearby colonies on rent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is shaping future engineers.
reviews.review_text: Swami Vivekananda university is big and awesome. It has the perfect environment and atmosphere which suits the college or university. It has huge labs for the different and separate sections of education. The university has an attractive look at the front and also at the intermediate, there is the big and large playground in the front of the university. Mainly, the university is located on a hill.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, quality of education, discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is situated in a big area. The labs are also there, and they also take us to the other places for the practicals. The classroom is fully air-conditioned, and the medical and the library facilites are also there. They give a chance to attend different seminars, and we also get the chances to interact with the companies.

reviews.review_heading: Placement record is not good but teachers are very helpful
reviews.review_text: Labs, the classroom, the library and sports facilities are good. The canteen is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi when I am in the college. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Also, there are good lab instruments. Lab attendants give us proper knowledge about the experiment. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure-related issues in my college time. Medical facilities are good as well.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I find the work and facilities at my college to be excellent.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very comfortable and provides good performance, although I don't stay in the hostel. However, the hostel is in very good condition, feels comfortable, and the bedrooms are awesome. The study materials are great, and the owner is an excellent worker. I hope the hostel maintains very good conditions, and the kitchen offers sweet food, served hot.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel or Wi-Fi facility in the college, as it is not even required because all the students are from the local city. But yes, if we talk about sports and games, then there is huge scope; they support all the curricular activities and once a year, a sports meet is also conducted for students.

The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for Oriental University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How are the placements at Oriental University?
What is the fee for B.Pharma at Oriental University?
Which companies are the top recruiters at Oriental University?
What is the median package offered to B.Tech students at Oriental University?

college_info.intro:
Oriental University's popular programmes are MBA, BTech, and BSc. The university offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Oriental University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, HR, IT, Marketing, Data Analytics, and others. The below-mentioned are Oriental University's popular programmes:
For more information about Oriental University check out the below video:

placements.overview: Oriental University has released a few placement statics for 2025 as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements. According to the official website, over 35,000 campus placements have been conducted so far. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA. Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA. The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai, and many others. The key highlights of the Oriental University Indore placements for BTech, MBA, and other courses are tabulated below:

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Oriental University is both entrance-based and merit-based. For undergraduate technical courses, admission is through the 12th percentage and national level test JEE. However, for other courses, admission is granted based on the 12th standard marks itself.So, while some courses may require an entrance exam, others may not. It’s recommended to check the specific admission criteria for the course you’re interested in on the official Oriental University website or admission portalThe basic eligibility for students seeking admission to the B.Tech course includes passing the 10+2 exam with Physics, Maths, and Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology/Vocational Sciences as main subjects through a recognised board or university with a minimum of 45% marks.I hope this information helps! If you have any other questions, feel free to ask.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

review_content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Oriental University is the best.

review_content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Pharma at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University offers a BPharma programme that lasts four years. Apart from the regular BPharma programme, the university also offers BPharma (Lateral Entry) programme. overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee for four years B.Tech at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. Other components included in the Oriental University fees are one-time fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Pharma available at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is available at Oriental University. The university admits students to its BPharma programme through the regular and the lateral entry mode. The durations of the regular BPharma programme and the lateral entry programme are four and three years, respectively. The university's Faculty of Pharmacy provides the programme. The total fee for the regular BPharma programme is INR 3.4 lakh. Eligible candidates can register for BPharma at Oriental University through the university's official website.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 72 LPA, the lowest is 2.0 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA in my course. Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and Co and Trilegal are the top recruiting companies. The percentage of students placed is 70 to 77 percent in the above-named companies and in Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Indus Law, P&A Law Offices, etc. Roles offered are Advocates, advisory, legal firm, corporate lawyers, in-house counsel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory here for everyone, and a gym facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.

content.Placements: The college placement drive is impressive, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package offered is 72 LPA. Top recruiters like TCS, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro, and HCL provided diverse and rewarding opportunities, reflecting strong industry connections.
content.Infrastructure: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is the best.

content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.

content.Placements: Hello, I’m Asutosh Pastor. I enrolled in Oriental University Indore in September 2024 for B.Tech. In my class, there are 60 students. My fee is 70,000, and the actual fee is 75,000. Since I got 70% in Class 12, I received a discount. However, I asked for more discounts because I belong to the EWS category, but they did not provide any discounts for EWS. They only provide discounts for OBC and SC categories. The college and hostel are decent. .
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

admission_overview.college_name: Oriental University Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Oriental University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Oriental University admission 2025is open. The university provides a wide range of courses in UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD levels. Interested candidates can register themselves on the admission portal admission.oui.edu.in/. The mode of application available is both online and offline, candidates who want to apply offline, have to visit the Oriental University, Indore campus along with relevant documents. The complete admission process is based on the respective entrance examination. Interested students can read the following article to know in-depth about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Oriental Univeristy.

Oriental University course admissionsin its UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD courses are based on respective national-level entrance examinations. The candidates must visit the official website to register for admission at the university. It is important that the applicants fulfil the preset admission criteria to get into the desiredOriental University courses: The eligibility and selection criteria are listed below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with min 45% (Gen) or 40% (SC, ST, OBC) in with relevant specialisation
Class 12 (any stream) with a minimum 50% aggregate (GEN/SC/ST/OBC)
Merit-based
Graduation (Any Discipline) with min 50% (Gen) & 45% (ST/SC/OBC)
Class 12 with min 45% (Gen)/40% (SC, ST, OBC) in Phy, Chem-Maths/Bio
Merit-based
Class 12 (PCM) with min 50% (Gen/SC/ST/OBC)
Merit-based
UG/PG in Any Discipline (Except BTech) with min 50% (GEN/OBC) and 45% (ST/SC)
For BTech/BE or Equivalent Degree with Science and Maths with Min 55% Marks for GEN/OBC and 50%
Merit-based
Class 12 (Any Discipline) with minimum 50% (Gen/SC/ST/OBC)
Merit-based
Class 12 (Any Discipline) with minimum 45% (Gen/OBC)/ 40% (SC/ST)
BCom (Hons)
Class 12 (Commerce/Science with Maths) with min 50% (Gen/SC/ST/OBC)
Merit-based

The admission process for Oriental University is conducted online via the official website of the university, Candidates need to provide valid entrance exam scores or provide scores in the last qualifying exam to be eligible for admission. The university conducts a common admission process for all of its courses. Find below the steps to complete theOriental University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
Visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired programme by filling out the application form.
Step 2: Selection Process
Students are shortlisted based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam or score secured by them in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Students can pay theOriental University feesand go through document verification for seat confirmation.

placement_report.college_name: Oriental University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Oriental University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released a few placement statistics for the 2025 drive as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements.

Earlier, over 1,157 placements were made to the 2024 passing-out batch and Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of placements offered (186). In addition to this, the University has a legacy of 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA . Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA . The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai , and many others.

reviews.review_heading: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.
reviews.review_text: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.
reviews.review_text: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in this range. If you have no other choices, you can apply to this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure and facilities are good.  
Wi-Fi is available but on the first floor.  
Canteen is all okay.  
Library is all good. I like it.  
Classrooms are spacious.  
And just labs are also okay.  
Sports may happen sometimes or not.  
Medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and the environment of college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are available. Food available in canteen is good, but the food in the mess is average. Environment is library is quite peaceful, we can study there without any disturbance and Wi-Fi is also available. Every floor has a lift and labs are available for practical .

reviews.review_heading: The college and the facilities or infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi surveillance is available, and the smart classroom and the central library are located, and many other classes. The quality of food is average in the mess. There are four-time meals in the mess. A canteen is also located.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Oriental University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is really vast, with labs for practical knowledge. The university also provides hostel facilities for students from different cities. The hostel provides mess facilities as well as Wi-Fi. Regional festivals of students from different states are also celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Why Oriental University Indore is good for you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good; allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Why choose Oriental University, Indore?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, spacious, and overall a good environment. Classrooms are good, and the library is good. Every book related to the course is available. Only the library has that there is no Wi-Fi all over campus. Food in the canteen is excellent. Sports facilities are less regular, not sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Oriental University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is good and management of the university is good canteens are well arranged and good food is provided. Furthermore, hostels are well-designed and maintained, and the meals are tasty. Many courses are available at our university with nice arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: The dream university: Oriental.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good, allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college value for money good at .

reviews.review_heading: My college provides all activities.

In the hostel, all facilities are good, like mess food, which is hygienic, and medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gouri Devi Institute of Medical Sciences and Hospital Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally satisfied with my college because of the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructures are too good compared to other medical colleges. All types of indoor and outdoor games equipment are available. Wi-Fi campus. Gym facilities available. Hostel foods are good compared to other hostels. Playgrounds, park, canteen, all are available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The following things are available: Labs, lecture hall, library, Wi-Fi, playground, gym, canteen, hostel, AC room, and good facilities in each department. Overall, it has good infrastructure. 4 times meals including snacks, are provided in the canteen or hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good study culture and learning environment for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: In medical college, labs are perfect and the infrastructure is good in quality and quantity. But there is no Wi-Fi facility. Library is good enough for students. Hostel is not good enough for students. Lodging is manageable but the food served is not good. Besides this, sports and games facilities are also held.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gouri Devi Institute of Medical Sciences and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in all departments are excellent, with 670 multi-speciality hospitals. Lecture theatres are air-conditioned, and the library has more than 11,000 books. The hostel has air-conditioners, a gym and an entertainment area. The food is very good. There are even scores for playing games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good faculty, really good infrastructure, and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is in building progress. We have a library with a capacity of 200 students, and there are many books available here. We have a large dissection hall where the dissection of cadavers is taught. We have other facilities like an indoor swimming pool, gym, and badminton court on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with a fast-developing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have all kinds of facilities available in our college. The library, well-furnished air-conditioned lecture theatres with well-equipped smart boards, Wi-Fi , and labs. The hostel has gym facilities, Wi-Fi, a study room, indoor games room for boys, and the college also has an indoor swimming pool.

reviews_list.review_title: It is not a good college for the B. Pharma course.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placements that you'll get guaranteed is less. Among 100%, only 20% of students will get placed. The highest salary package offered may be around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Only a few students get internships and the others have to do it on their own. There are good companies that visit our college for providing placements but I doubt anyone would get one.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is available. There is a library with books available for free. There are annual sports and a gym is available. The canteen is a bit chaotic but if you can compromise, you can pass by. Labs have all the equipment. But sometimes, you have to borrow stuff from other labs. reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and could be made much better.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not the best in our college. A few good companies come to HK, but the placement rate still remains low due to a high number of management quota students. This causes a lot of internal strikes too. But that doesn't mean no one gets placement. 30% of students get placed, which means you have to be in the top 30%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good and air-conditioned, though I have never have seen them. The library has quite a lot of volumes but is not ventilated well. Labs have lots of equipment, but it looks quite old. There is no college Wi-Fi. The canteen is not that good, and it barely has water bottles. There is no vegetarian food. The gym is well-equipped. There is no working water tap anywhere on campus.

review_summary.college_name: H.K. College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is honest review of college. If we include all the factor then the college is good.

content.Placements: So, the B.Pharma batch contains around 100 students. Around 20 to 30 percent of students get placed every year. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the average is around 3 LPA, while the lowest is around 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies that come to our college are Cipla, Dabur, Himalayan, and Sun Pharma. The internship program in college is very good; each student gets an internship in a hospital or industry like Cipla or Tata. Roles like HR, Quality Control, and Marketing Department roles are offered in our college by companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good library, canteen, playground, auditorium facilities, and also Wi-Fi is available. In our classrooms, projectors are available where we see PPTs and study. Hospital facilities are not available in our college, but PGs are available near the college. The canteen environment is good and provides healthy food. Various sports events are also held in our college, where sports like cricket, football, and indoor games like carrom and chess are played.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good intentions. It is a bit strict.

content.Placements: About 10% of students got selected by good companies but not the top ones. The highest salary package was offered by TCS to a guy in the MR department. Cipla, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, TCS, and Mankind also came for recruitment. The condition of Internships is not good. You will not get a stipend, but the experience will be provided. MR and computer students are preferred.
content.Infrastructure: You will get all types of instruments required for study purposes. All labs are in good condition. The batch capacity is 25. No one ever tries to enter the hostel because it is nearly impossible to get in. The area is quite expensive for paying guests. The campus has IT rooms and Wi-Fi. The library is pretty good. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lit. The cafeteria is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good college for the B. Pharma course.

content.Placements: The percentage of placements that you'll get guaranteed is less. Among 100%, only 20% of students will get placed. The highest salary package offered may be around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Only a few students get internships and the others have to do it on their own. There are good companies that visit our college for providing placements but I doubt anyone would get one.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, Wi-Fi is available. There is a library with books available for free. There are annual sports and a gym is available. The canteen is a bit chaotic but if you can compromise, you can pass by. Labs have all the equipment. But sometimes, you have to borrow stuff from other labs. The instruments are not enough for everyone to begin with.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and could be made much better.

content.Placements: The placements are not the best in our college. A few good companies come to HK, but the placement rate still remains low due to a high number of management quota students. This causes a lot of internal strikes too. But that doesn't mean no one gets placement. 30% of students get placed, which means you have to be in the top 30%.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good and air-conditioned, though I have never have seen them. The library has quite a lot of volumes but is not ventilated well. Labs have lots of equipment, but it looks quite old. There is no college Wi-Fi. The canteen is not that good, and it barely has water bottles. There is no vegetarian food. The gym is well-equipped. There is no working water tap anywhere on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good.

content.Placements: There was a placement cell in the college. Not many companies visited the campus for placements, but some companies like Abbott, TCS, and Quintiles visited the campus to hire the students. The salary package offered to placed students was average. I would say the placement cell could be more efficient if they help at least 50% of the students to get placed in the campus placements. Training is necessary for the students to get placed in campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are huge with the air-conditioning facility, and the wooden benches in the classrooms are comfortable. Labs are well-built and are equipped with all the instruments. All the labs are kept clean and hygienic. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and the canteen is too small. The area should be well-built and expanded. I haven't faced any issues regarding the infrastructure.

As one of the Institutes of National Importance (INI) specialised in Engineering the flagship programme of IIT Hyderabad is definitely its BTech programme from among its range of courses at the UG, PG and PhD levels. The BTech courses is extended across a range of specialisations and is highly sought-after among students. A few of the highlights for IITH BTech programme are as listed below:
The IITH BTech programme remains the most popular programme at the institute due to its great placements and career opportunities after graduation with students having average packages of around INR 33.96 LPA in 2025. faqs.answer: A:    Students requiring M.Tech in IIT Hyderabad will be required to have an existing degree in BE/BTech or its equivalent as well as a valid and current GATE score. It is also applicable by final-year students. Additional requirements may exist at particular departments. Minimum qualifying marks are based upon specialisation and Category.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech at IIT Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    IIT Hyderabad released it's last round of cutoff list. As per the cutoff list, BTech in Artificial Intelligence was one of the most sought after specialisation. In the last round, the cutoff rank for AI among the General AI category candidates was closed at 875. In 2023 and 2022, the cutoff ranks for the same specialistion were 926 and 840, respectively. The table given below provides the category-wise cutoff ranks for admission to BTech in AI at IIT Hyderabad:CategoryLast Round Closing RankGeneral AI875OBC AI399SC AI251ST AI89EWS AI127
faqs.question: What is the cutoff Artificial Intelligence at the IIT Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: A:    IIT Hyderabad cut off rank in Round 6 for BTech in Computer Science and Engineering is 674 which is very close to this range. This was for general category under All India quota. Unless the candidate belongs to some other category or domicile, one can not afford to score less than this. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing from round to round, better ranks definitely increases your chances of getting admission in IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of IIT Hyderabad College.

review_content.Placements: Honestly, the campus placements here are fantastic. If you have skills, it's pretty straightforward to get placed with a decent package. We're talking about a 100% placement rate because more than enough companies are coming to our campus. It's not unusual for a student to end up with two job offers. The highest and the lowest packages vary by branch, but I'd say the top package can reach up to 50 LPA, while the lowest sits around 15 LPA-16 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: In spite of the college's overall infrastructure being just alright, the campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-used labs, comfortable classrooms, and extensive library become a great source of satisfaction. The vast array of textbooks and other materials available on campus removes the necessity for students to buy many of the resources from outside. Students can also avail themselves of transportation and on-campus housing facilities in case they do not have their own vehicles. The mess is clean, and if we talk about the food menu, it is quite good, but if more items of students' choice are introduced, it will surely be beneficial.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Industrial Chemistry - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Campus Life at IIT Hyderabad.

review_content.Placements: 70% were placed in my college last year. The highest package is 30 LPA. All students got an internship in our branch. It is one of the best branches at IIT Hyderabad. You can also prepare for tech. The course of our branches is well prepared and organised.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our course is also very nice. Our department consists of a building in which most of the rooms belong to labs. In every room, you will get free Wi-Fi. The canteen will serve at least five items per day, and the taste is also very nice.

Indian Institute of Hyderabad accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced for BTech courses. For MTech, GATE scores are accepted. faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced
faqs.question: Q: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?

faqs.answer: No doubt, 2000 rank is a decent rank in JEE Advanced exam. Candidates securing this much of rank will surely get selection at IIT Hyderabad. However, for top courses like CSE and AI, they need to secure lesser than that. As per IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff 2024, the required rank stood between 656 and 9551, wherein, the most sought-after course was BTech in CSE. Candidates can check out below the courses available under 2000 rank at IIT Hyderabad for the General AI quota:Course2024B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering2105B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering4469B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering5757B.Tech. in Civil Engineering7898B.Tech. in Engineering Science3835B.Tech. in Engineering Physics4932B.Tech. in Materials Science and Metallurgical Engineering8197B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering8493B.Tech. in Industrial Chemistry9551B.Tech. in Biotechnology and Bioinformatics8524B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (IC Design and Technology)2147
faqs.question: Q: I have got 2000 rank in JEE Advanced. What rank do I require to take admission in IIT Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: To get into IIT Hyderabad M.Tech course candidates must first have a valid qualification and secure a valid entrance exam. Admission to the M.Tech course is entrance-based. The technology institute accepts scores of the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE). Candidates who further get shortlisted need to take part in COAP counselling. It is necessary that each aspirant clear the entrance test with a valid rank. Moreover, the application process is online (iitb.ac.in) for the IIT Hyderabad M.Tech course.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into IIT Hyderabad MTech?

faqs.answer: No, candidates can not take direct admission at IIT Hyderabad. The college offers various courses at UG, PG and Doctoral levels based on the score in entrance exams for respective courses.

review_summary.college_name: IIT Hyderabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Ph.D. in Physics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Do your best hardwork to get into IIT.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Almost all students get placed. Most of my friends got placed. Mostly students were placed in different top universities as associate professors. Some students were getting internships from foreign countries like Japan, Russia, the UK, USA universities. Good internship opportunities were available for all branches. You can receive information regarding these from the Office of Career Service OCS IITH. A lot of Japanese companies hire from here.
content.Infrastructure: Libraries were the best. They look like fictional libraries any reader would just love. Almost all genres were available. There was online checking facility of availability of books. Seating spaces were very creative specially crafted for studying and peaceful work. Classrooms were very good. Air conditioning, projectors, TV, stepped platform, etc. The premises are very friendly. There is a gym and track and all facilities separately for each sport. Track for running, basketball court, tennis court, football ground, cricket ground, closed and open, open running track, closed running track, volleyball court etc separately.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: IIT Hyderabad is a good college.

content.Placements: From the 7th semester, students are eligible for campus placements. Some companies that visit the college are Samsung Research, Adobe Research, and Intel. The highest package offered this year is 90 LPA, and the average package offered is 23 LPA. The percentage of students who get placements is 74.90 percent. I am still trying to figure out whether to do higher studies or to do a job. Wipro and Suzuki provide many internship opportunities. Many consulting companies also come to the college. Developing ourselves must be our priority after joining the college because there are so many opportunities for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IIT Hyderabad College.

content.Placements: Honestly, the campus placements here are fantastic. If you have skills, it's pretty straightforward to get placed with a decent package. We're talking about a 100% placement rate because more than enough companies are coming to our campus. It's not unusual for a student to end up with two job offers. The highest and the lowest packages vary by branch, but I'd say the top package can reach up to 50 LPA, while the lowest sits around 15 LPA-16 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In spite of the college's overall infrastructure being just alright, the campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-used labs, comfortable classrooms, and extensive library become a great source of satisfaction. The vast array of textbooks and other materials available on campus removes the necessity for students to buy many of the resources from outside. Students can also avail themselves of transportation and on-campus housing facilities in case they do not have their own vehicles. The mess is clean, and if we talk about the food menu, it is quite good, but if more items of students' choice are introduced, it will surely be beneficial.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Industrial Chemistry - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Campus Life at IIT Hyderabad.

content.Placements: 70% were placed in my college last year. The highest package is 30 LPA. All students got an internship in our branch. It is one of the best branches at IIT Hyderabad. You can also prepare for tech. The course of our branches is well prepared and organised.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our course is also very nice. Our department consists of a building in which most of the rooms belong to labs. In every room, you will get free Wi-Fi. The canteen will serve at least five items per day, and the taste is also very nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Engineering Physics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Awesome infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: The course I chose, engineering physics is more research-oriented. This year, only 5 out of 25 students got placed. But I am sure only 10-15 applied for placements as most are inclined to research. Internships are offered by multiple types of companies like software companies but also other ones like LIGO. Some people did internships in universities in Germany too.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is excellent, spacious, and has charming architecture. There are single rooms for 2nd years and above. The food in the mess is good too with lots of variety even if it tends to get boring after a while. The library is also known as the Knowledge Research Center. It is very big with lots of books and e-resources. Labs are equipped with the best possible and updated equipment. The Wi-Fi is super fast here, in the full campus.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT Hyderabad IIT Hyderabad Admission 2026: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

admission_overview.title: IIT Hyderabad Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IIT Hyderabad Admission 2026 is open. The college offers UG, PG, professional, and doctoral programmes in the field of Engineering, Design, Sciences, and Liberal Arts. Admissions to IIT Hyderabad are primarily entrance-based. BTech applicants must clear JEE Main and JEE Advanced, followed by JoSAA counselling. BDes requires UCEED, MTech requires GATE, and MDes requires CEED scores. Selection to PG and PhD programmes may also involve departmental screening and interviews. Direct admission is offered to eligible IIT graduates in select PG programmes.

eligibility_selection.title: IIT Hyderabad Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Aspirants willing to take IIT Hyderabad course admissions 2026 have top appear for national-level entrance exams followed by counselling. The entrances accepted here at IIT Hyderabad include JEE Main, JEE Advanced, IIT JAM, GATE, etc. Check below the IIT Hyderabad courses along with their eligibility, fees and selection criteria: Course Name

faqs.answer: No doubt,  2000 rank is a decent rank in JEE Advanced exam. Candidates securing this much of rank will surely get selection at IIT Hyderabad. However, for top courses like CSE and AI, they need to secure lesser than that. As per IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff 2024, the required rank stood between 656 and 9551, wherein, the most sought-after course was BTech in CSE.
