faqs.question: I have got 2000 rank in JEE Advanced. What rank do I require to take admission in IIT Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: The last round closing ranks for the OBC AI category for IIT Hyderabad ranged between 302 and 4097 in the last round. CSE and Electrical were some of the toughest specialisations due to the competitive cutoffs. For CSE, the target should be below 302; while for Electrical, candidates belonging to the OBC category must target below 1021.
faqs.question: I belong to the OBC category and aim for IIT Hyderabad with CSE or Electrical. How much rank should I target?

faqs.answer: Yes, admission is possible with a rank of 8000, considering the IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 for the General AI category. For this category, the overall closing cutoff ranged from 667 to 10043. Hence, a rank of 8K will make a student eligible for IIT Hyderabad admission, if they belong to the General AI category. Please note that other categories, rounds, etc., will have different qualifying cutoffs accordingly, and that admission is based on various factors, like total number of seats, difficulty level of exam, etc.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to IIT Hyderabad with a rank of 8000?

faqs.answer: The required rank need for IIT Hyderabad admission would depend entirely on the IIT Hyderabad BTech cutoff 2025 for a particular category and round. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff varied between 667 and 10043. Therefore, students who belong to this category need to attain a rank between this range.Students can refer to the table below to know the overall cutoff range for other All India categories. CategoryIIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced Cutoff 2025General667 - 10043OBC 284 -  4107SC179 - 2572ST65 - 1224PWD17 - 166EWS93 - 1694

admission_process.title: IIT Hyderabad Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IIT Hyderabad has a multi-step admission process which students need to follow to get into the institute. The process includes appearing for the relevant entrance exam, application process, counselling and subsequent admission.The JEE Advanced 2026 official website has launched with the new eligibility criteria.A step-by-stepadmission process of IIT Hyderabadis as mentioned below:
Application Process

Students interested in getting into IIT Hyderabad can submit the online application form for course-specific entrance exams or college, depending on the course they wish to get into. Students can register to the below-mentioned list to learn about the entrance tests required for some of thepopular IIT Hyderabad courses:
Selection Criteria and Release of Merit List

After completion of the registration process, applicants need to go through the course-based entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds. After the selection rounds are completed, they need to go through the course-wise counselling process for final seat allocation. For aPhD, merit lists are released on the official website (with the names of the shortlisted students).
Step 3: Admission Confirmation at IIT Hyderabad
After completion of the selection rounds, applicants who are shortlisted can submit the admission charges and confirm their admission to the relevant course at IIT Hyderabad.

The IIT Hyderabad's fee varies with the course selected by the candidate. However, the tuition fee for IIT Hyderabad ranges between INR 17,000 to INR 8 lakh. Candidates can check below the table that mentions a list of IIT Hyderabad courses along with their fees:
Note: This is taken from the official website of college. It may change.
lists: BTech, BTech and MTech (Dual Degree) and BSc/ BS aspirants must fill out the application form for JEE (Main) via the official website of the National Testing Agency (NTA) (nta.ac.in).
MTech candidates are required to register for GATE via the official website of the GATE Online Application Processing System (GOAPS) (appsgate.iitd.ac.in)
For PhD, students are required to apply via the official website of IIT Hyderabad.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for the B.Tech course at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The BTech programme at IIT Hyderabad is offered to the students on the basis of their performance in the JEE Advanced examination.Aspirants need to clear JEE Main to be taken into consideration to appear in JEE advanced.JoSAA counselling involves allotment of final seats.The whole procedure is competitive on an entrance basis.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech admission at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech at IIT Hyderabad requires passing Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics.Candidateshave to clear JEE Main then perform well at JEE Advanced.Finally setas are alloted throughJoSAA counselling.Other requirements that are necessary include age limit, limit of attempts which is in JEE norms.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of IIT Hyderabad?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Students requiring M.Tech in IIT Hyderabad will be required to have an existing degree in BE/BTech or its equivalent as well as a valid and current GATE score.It is also applicable by final-year students.Additional requirements may exist at particular departments.Minimum qualifying marks are based upon specialisation and Category.

faqs.question: How can I apply for M.Tech admission at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The candidates are required to apply through the portal-CCMT and register through the GOAPS portal to GATE.There might be some departments of IIT Hyderabad also, which might consider direct applications of sponsored, part-time or non-GATE candidates.The process of the application is online.

faqs.question: Is a GATE score mandatory for M.Tech at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: Yes, the entry in most M.Tech programs at the IIT Hyderabad requires a valid score in GATE.But the institute can give exceptions of candidates not selected in GATE but can be eligible based on special categories such as sponsored seats or working professionals in the internal evaluation process.

faqs.question: When are IIT Hyderabad application forms out?
faqs.answer: As IIT Hyderabad admissions depends on entrance exam scores such as JEE Mains/Advanced, GATE, IIT JAM, etc. the release of application forms coincides with the release of the application forms for these exams. Students should check the website of their respective exam and the IIT Hyderabad page for the latest information.

courses_data.name: IIT Hyderabad BDes Admission 2026
courses_data.description: The IIT Hyderabad offers an undergraduate four-year Bachelor of Design (BDes) in the Department of Design.The entrance-based admission process is UCEED which is hosted by IIT Bombay.Applicants need to qualify in UCEED and attend the centralized counselling process to bag a seat.The demonstration uses creativity, innovation and technology to educate design-wise.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BDes at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: To apply to BDes in IIT Hyderabad the students must have cleared Class 12 in any discipline with qualified marks and must appear in UCEED.The admission is made based on the UCEED rank.There are also an attempt and age restriction according to UCEED instructions.

faqs.question: What entrance exam is required for BDes at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: BDes is offered by IIT Hyderabad which is now conducted using the Undergraduate Common Entrance Examination for Design (UCEED).The test focuses on the aspects of design aptitude, creativity, logical thinking ability, and visual perception ability.The obtained rank is used in counselling and seat allocation.

faqs.question: Is there an interview for B.Des admission at IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: No, IIT Hyderabad does not have a dedicated interview round in case of BDes admission.The process of selection is exclusively made on the UCEED rank and centralized seat allocation.To confirm the admission then candidates are supposed to meet eligibility criteria and pass through the processes of counselling.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get a seat at IIT Hyderabad for B.Des? I belong to OBC category.

For the OBC AI category, the Round 1 UCEED cutoff 2025 was also42. IIT Hyderabad’s BDes admission is done through the UCEED entrance exam, followed by a counselling process.

faqs.question: How can I join IIT Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: To join IIT Hyderabad aspriring candidates need to clear JEE, GATE, CEED or UCEED. To be eligible for the BTech programme at IIT Hyderabad aspring candidates need to clear JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced and they also need to have 75% in their class 12 exam. The BTech programme is offered under 15 specialisations at IIT Hyderabad. Some of the specialisations include Artificial Intelligence, Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering.

faqs.question: Till which date can I fill the choices in JoSAA counselling?
faqs.answer: The dates for JoSAA counselling 2026 choice filling will be announced once the result of JEE Main 2026 is declared. Candidates can fill choices only during the choice filling period. Also, candidates need to lock their choices before the last date.

placement_report.college_name: IIT Hyderabad Placements 2026: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: IIT Hyderabad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 389 students registered and 374 students were placed during IIT Hyderabad placement 2025. 353 companies registered out of which 17 were international companies . More than 710 offers were made out of which 53 were international offers . A total of 130 PPOs were made during IITH placement 2025. The highest and the average package stood at INR 128 LPA and INR 33.96 LPA, respectively.

For the IIT Hyderabad placements 2024, the highest package given was INR 90 LPA and the average package received was INR 22.5 LPA. For the MSc and MTech program, the highest package stood at INR 58 LPA. A total of 521 offers were made by 320 companies. BTech, MTech and PhD program placement rate was 86.67%, 76.47% and 100% , respectively. At the end of season 2024, a total of 493 students were placed, and 43 international offers were seen.

Moreover, the highest stipend offered during summer internships for the batch 2023-2024 was INR 2 lakh per month and the average stipend stood at INR 79,000 per month . The total count of summer internships was 159 and semester internships was 73 .

description: IIT Hyderabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 14 years of IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIT Hyderabad cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT Hyderabad JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 10043 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank

IIT Hyderabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 673 and 10043, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence, followed by B.Tech. in Mathematics and Computing, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 861 and 1015, respectively, in the General AI category.

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Hyderabad. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling was conducted in multiple rounds for admission to the IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. Candidates with a valid JEE Advanced 2025 score can participate in JoSAA for BTech admission at IITs. Conducted by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA), in 2025, a total of six seat allotment rounds were released for admission. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise JEE Advanced cutoff lists for IIT Hyderabad

The JEE Advanced 2025 cutoff was announced for admission to the BTech and other courses. Here, candidates can do a comparative analysis to view the specialisations available at other IITs for admission. The comparison is provided based on the JEE Advanced last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students.

IIT Hyderabad UCEED cutoff 2026 is yet to be released for admission to the B.Des course. In the meantime, candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the UCEED 2025 first and last round cutoff details.

In 2025, the IIT Hyderabad B.Des cutoff 2025 was 61 in the last round for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In the first round, the cutoff rank stood at . Check out the table below to view the UCEED 2025 cutoff for the General category under the AI quota.

For the General AI quota, the UCEED 2025 cutoff for B.Des admission was 61 in the last round. In 2024, the cutoff for the same course was 58, while in 2023, it was 67. So, analysing the last three years' cutoff data, it is evident that UCEED cutoff ranks saw an inconsistency in the last round closing rank for B.Des admission over three years.

IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology accepts the UCEED entrance exam to shortlist students for B.Des admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the important UCEED 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

The UCEED 2025 counselling was concluded with the release of the five seat allotment rounds. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise UCEED cutoff lists from the table below for admission to the B.Des course at IIT Hyderabad.

IIT Hyderabad JAM cutoff 2026 for M.Sc. admission has yet to be released. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view last year's cutoff data and estimate the upcoming cutoff. The IIT JAM 2025 cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks across categories under the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the last round of the IIT Hyderabad M.Sc. cutoff 2025 ranged from 309 to 321, with M.Sc. in Chemistry being the most competitive for admission. In the first round, the closi

IIT JAM last round cutoff ranks over three years are presented in the table below. Students can use the provided filters and choose the rounds and categories to view the cutoff data. Considering the last year's cutoff data, M.Sc. in Chemistry had the lowest cutoff for admission in the last round. This indicates that demand for this specialisation was high in 2025 as compared to other MSc specialisations among the General AI category students. In the last round, the closing rank for this branch w

IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology admits students to its MSc courses based on candidates' performance in the IIT JAM entrance exam. Aspirants with a valid score are then called for the counselling round for final seat allotment. Candidates preparing for admission can check out the important dates for IIT JAM 2026 to be eligible for admission to the MSc courses.

In 2025, four admission lists were released for IIT JAM for admission to the MSc course across multiple specialisations at IIT Hyderabad - Indian Institute of Technology. Candidates preparing for next year can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise IIT JAM cutoff lists to understand the past year's cutoff trends.

IIT Hyderabad MDes cutoff 2024 is based on CEED scores 2024 followed by the round-wise CEED Counselling. IIT Hyderabad CEED cutoff 2024 is out for Part A. The mean and standard deviation for CEED 2024 Part A are 41.90 and 16.72, respectively. Refer to the table given below to check out the CEED Part A cutoff 2024 for IIT Hyderabad.

highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is IIT Hyderabad. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #12 under the category Overall, #7 under Engineering, #15 under Research Institutions, and #6 under Innovation. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #681-690 position. IIT Hyderabad is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the IIT Hyderabad rankings.
Read less

Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Hyderabad In 2025
Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Hyderabad In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, IIT Hyderabad outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Hyderabad's rank is #12, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, IIT Hyderabad climbed 1 rank to #7 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It can be seen that; in the 'Research Institutions' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Hyderabad's rank is #15, the same as last year's rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Innovation' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, IIT Hyderabad fell 3 ranks to #6 rank in the 'Innovation' category by the NIRF ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
IIT Hyderabad has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for IIT Hyderabad indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, IIT Hyderabad climbed 17 ranks to #664 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Hyderabad climbed 50 ranks to #270 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIT Hyderabad climbed 21 ranks to #60 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

sports.description: IIT Hyderabad offer different sports facilities to promote holistic development and sportsmanship among students. The institute offers both indoor and outdoor facilities. There is a modern sports complex with cricket grounds, football fields, hockey fields, tennis courts, etc. The indoor sports facilities at the institute include a gymnasium, badminton courts, squash and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Do your best hardwork to get into IIT.
reviews.review_text: Libraries were the best. They look like fictional libraries any reader would just love. Almost all genres were available. There was online checking facility of availability of books. Seating spaces were very creative specially crafted for studying and peaceful work. Classrooms were very good. Air conditioning, projectors, TV, stepped platform, etc. The premises are very friendly. There is a gym and track and all facilities separately for each sport. Track for running, basketball court, tennis co...

reviews.review_heading: IIT Hyderabad is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the most beautiful and best thing I liked. All buildings have a form of Japanese infrastructure. The maintenance of the hostels is so poor. The food in the mess is not very good. It is not so spicy, and mainly, South Indians don't like the food. The library is very good and very accessible. All classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and screens for easy and good learning.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIT Hyderabad College.
reviews.review_text: In spite of the college's overall infrastructure being just alright, the campus-wide Wi-Fi, well-used labs, comfortable classrooms, and extensive library become a great source of satisfaction. The vast array of textbooks and other materials available on campus removes the necessity for students to buy many of the resources from outside. Students can also avail themselves of transportation and on-campus housing facilities in case they do not have their own vehicles. The mess is clean, and if we t...

reviews.review_heading: Campus Life at IIT Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is also very nice. Our department consists of a building in which most of the rooms belong to labs. In every room, you will get free Wi-Fi. The canteen will serve at least five items per day, and the taste is also very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is excellent, spacious, and has charming architecture. There are single rooms for 2nd years and above. The food in the mess is good too with lots of variety even if it tends to get boring after a while. The library is also known as the Knowledge Research Center. It is very big with lots of books and e-resources. Labs are equipped with the best possible and updated equipment. The Wi-Fi is super fast here, in the full campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty and facilities, but limited core placements in mechanical.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in hostels, mess, canteen, academic blocks, etc. The new library opened last year and is very big, with access to a variety of books. Labs are well-equipped. The new sports complex opened last year and has all games available. Mess food is not good most of the time.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Technology has the best architecture.
reviews.review_text: IIT Hyderabad's 576-acre campus features sustainable architecture, single-occupancy hostels with radiant cooling, diverse dining options, and modern sports facilities. The college has a well-equipped gym, 24/7 medical services, banking, and a supermarket. It ensures a holistic student experience.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in college is good. Everything is fine with no remarks.
reviews.review_text: Facilities they provide are pretty good and the infrastructure is awesome. We get single-room occupancy. The food is okay, quite good for South Indians but not for North Indians. The canteen is pretty decent. Medical and sports were superb and there is no remark on them.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Hyderabad: The Dream College.
reviews.review_text: Since the hostels for the UG students were recently constructed they are neat clean and spacious. There is also the facility of radiant cooling which is a game change in the scorching heat of Hyderabad. The sports complex offers a wide range of sports facilities which are world-class. Though the mess food is hygienic and nutritional but the taste is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Hyderabad and its beauty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and the infrastructure is inspired by Japanese architecture. There is unlimited Wi-Fi on the campus, and classrooms are well-air-conditioned. The hostel rooms use radiant cooling techniques. The mess food is good in the canteen, and get everything we need.

reviews.review_heading: IITH - The next best IIT in India.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in IITH is just amazing. Many buildings here are inspired by Japanese architecture. Classrooms are vast, modern, and equipped with ACs. Hostels are new and clean. All the facilities provided are worth every penny paid. Mess food is also great but everyone may not like it. There are canteens and cafeterias with many eateries.

reviews.review_heading: The highest-growing IIT is IIT Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities are provided in IITs. IITH also has all types of facilities. IITH have one of the best architecture in India inspired by Japanese architecture. It has all types of labs, research facilities, and full Wi-Fi all over the campus. The mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports are the best in India.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied & amazed by the awesome infrastructure, but would have loved some more greenery on campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-class. We have 10-floor hostel buildings with single-sharing rooms equipped with a radiant cooling system. The rooms are of single occupancy. The campus has multiple department buildings, and every building is unique and magnificent. The library is also very huge, with a lot of study rooms, discussion rooms, study tables, etc. The food in the mess is also quite satisfactory. The quality is good, and they have a fixed weekly menu. Each room in the hostel has a LAN port, ...

reviews.review_heading: IITH is one of the best campuses for research and it is the fastest-growing IIT.
reviews.review_text: Here we will get all the facilities in a good manner like Wi-Fi, classrooms and library. The library is one of the best places to enjoy on campus. Mess food is not up to the mark. We have good sports facilities. The canteen is also good. There are around 20 hostels.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Hyderabad boasts excellent placements and a fantastic infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are first-rate, including first-rate labs and amenities like Wi-Fi. The library is excellent, and the classrooms are spacious. Additionally, the college offers hostel accommodation where we may eat well. Compared to the canteen, the mess is clean and has a wider selection of food. Sports and games materials and activities are offered, as are medical amenities.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies were Microsoft, Qualcomm, Oracle, Goldman Sachs, ISRO, HPCL, BPCL, Samsung, Honeywell, and many more.

college_info.college_name: IIT Hyderabad Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad scholarships vary from merit to means. IITH offers means-cum-merit scholarships to GEN, GEN-EWS/ OBC students and ST/ SC scholarships at the institute level. IITH also accepts scholarships offered by the government/state government. Candidates applying for institute scholarships can write an email to the Acads office of IITH, whereas candidates who are applying for scholarships offered by the government/ state government have to apply through the National Scholarship Portal.

-No active backlogs in any subject

-No active backlogs in any subject
